use: COMMON/global setup вҖ” clone dancinlab/sidecar вҶ’ ~/.sidecar/cli + a sidecar wrapper on ~/.local/bin + global hooks (idempotent). NOT a per-repo scaffold (that's init). curl one-liner: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dancinlab/sidecar/main/scripts/install.sh | bash

scaffold THIS repo: config + .harness rules + gitignore + wrapper (hooks are GLOBAL-ONLY вҶ’ sidecar install) (strict by default: block-everything + branch protection + pre-push verify + single-doc scaffolds)

Stop gate вҖ” blocks a reply that PUNTS the work: defers to a future session ('лӢӨмқҢ м„ём…ҳм—җвҖҰ'/'next session', tail-precise) OR reports live 'мһ”м—¬' (leftover work, negation-aware) вҖ” so the agent finishes now; single-fire (stop_hook_active), genuine blocker passes on re-stop (session-terminal)

delegate ONE instruction to the Fable 5 model via headless 'claude -p' (default -m claude-fable-5 В· prompt from argv words/--file/stdin, sent via child stdin вҖ” no argv leak/quoting В· --json = claude --output-format json В· --dry = print resolved argv, no run В· --cwd <dir> В· --sources <l> = setting sources (default project,local вҖ” DROPS the global governance hooks that stall a headless child in a dirty repo; pass user,project,local to inherit the full session env) В· -c/--continue = continue the most recent conversation in --cwd В· -r/--resume <id> = resume a session_id from a prior --json run (stateful В· same --cwd) В· --timeout <s> = kill a stalled run after s seconds (default OPT-IN cap, default UNLIMITED, exit 124) В· flags after -- go to claude verbatim) В· --bg = fire-and-forget (launch detached вҶ’ prints a job id, returns now); collect with 'sidecar fable result <id>' (RUNNING=exit3) / 'tail <id>' (follow output live) / 'wait <id> [--timeout s]' / 'list' вҖ” no hand-rolled poll loop В· --write (aliases --bypass/--agent) = grant WRITE/EXECUTE via --permission-mode bypassPermissions (Write/Edit/Bash/git В· no prompts) so the child can implement; DEFAULT is READ-ONLY (headless can't approve, so writes auto-deny вҖ” Read/Grep/Glob only) В· opus fallback FORBIDDEN (always, not a flag): pins an availableModels allowlist without Opus, so a safety-classifier-flagged request refuses on the delegated model instead of silently re-running on Opus)
